issue.title: [Task]: Server webhook dispatch smoke test
issue.body:
### Work Type

Task

### Problem / Goal

Verify end-to-end dispatch from POST /github/webhook.

### Context

Server BDD fixture.

### Expected Outcome

Routes are produced and queued.

### Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] The webhook is accepted.
- [ ] At least one route is produced.

### Reproduction Steps / Task Plan

1. POST to /github/webhook.

### Priority

P2 - normal

### Requester / Owner

@frankyxhl
